justification: The diff correctly upgrades Java version to 21, migrates javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence, updates Hibernate to 6.5.x, and uses Java 21 features like pattern matching for instanceof and String.formatted(). It also cleans up wildcard imports and adds @Serial annotations. However, it doesn't fully leverage all Java 21 idioms (e.g., records, sealed classes, virtual threads) and some changes are mechanical rather than idiomatic.
